postReview.title: Italy 2-2 Belgium: Trossard completes comeback to deny 10-man hosts
postReview.description: Italy looked well on course for a third straight Nations League win at 2-0 up, but Lorenzo Pellegrini's red card let Belgium back in.

preReview.title: Tedesco puts faith in Belgium's 'promising' youngsters ahead of Italy test
preReview.description: Belgium face Italy in the Nations League on Thursday, with head coach Domenico Tedesco confident in the Red Devils' youthful side.
